title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **High risk: shell/launcher entrypoints break immediately** [`.zshrc`](/Users/masayuki/.zshrc):96, [`.zshrc`](/Users/masayuki/.zshrc):118, [`.zshrc`](/Users/masayuki/.zshrc):165 hardcode `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator` (`codexw`, `MIYABI_CODEX_START_CMD`, secret fallback path). - **High risk: runtime approval/prefix system drift** [`.codex/rules/default.rules`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/rules/default.rules) has many exact-path allow rules for `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator` and `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner` (examples: lines 28, 63, 266, 390, 440, 503, 613, 786, 929). Renaming without compatibility path will invalidate these command patterns and break expected execution/approval behavior. - **High risk: skills runtime routing breaks** [`.codex/skills/notebooklm-shared/SKILL.md`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notebooklm-shared/SKILL.md):8,15 [`.codex/skills/notebooklm-slide-prep/SKILL.md`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notebooklm-slide-prep/SKILL.md):8,19 [`.codex/skills/notebooklm-visual-brief/SKILL.md`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/notebooklm-visual-brief/SKILL.md):8,20 [`.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js):61-62 all hardcode old absolute paths. - **High risk: Claude command adapter breaks** [`.claude/commands/search.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/commands/search.md):10,56 runs `search.js` via hardcoded `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/...`. - **Medium-high risk: worktree-specific test hooks** [`.codex/rules/default.rules`](/Users/masayuki/.codex/rules/default.rules):787-791 references `/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/...`. - **Compatibility symlink necessity** Yes, for safe migration you should keep compatibility symlinks at least for: - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner` Without them, launcher/runtime/skills/approval surfaces above will regress immediately. `fugue-orchestrator-public` is mostly doc-level references; lower urgency unless actively executed scripts depend on it.
